# Phil Greene

Phil Greene is a B.S. Data Science student at Southern New Hampshire University and a technical builder specializing in data analytics and SEO automation. He transitions from a hands-on service background into technical problem-solving, leveraging Python, SQL, and AI workflows.

## Profile
- Role: Data Analyst / SEO Automation Builder
- Location: Manchester, New Hampshire
- Tech Stack: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Automation), SQL, GitHub, Google Search Console, AI APIs
- Education: B.S. Data Science (In Progress), SNHU

## Key Projects

### LegalLeaflet
AI-powered contract generation for solo freelancers.
- Tech: Python, Django, AI APIs
- Outcome: Live MVP for automated contract creation.

### Manchester Junk Hauling SEO
Data-driven local SEO and search analytics automation.
- Tech: Google Search Console, Python
- Outcome: Automated content workflows and verified visibility growth.

### Stellar Styles & More (Etsy)
E-commerce data operations and conversion optimization.
- Stats: 500+ sales
- Outcome: Profitable store optimized through sales trend analysis.
